task_completion.description: Verify the location and date are correctly set in Stellarium.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium interface (bottom bar or configuration windows) shows the date as 2024-11-15 and the location as Mayhill, NM.

task_completion.description: Verify the required display flags are set for clear observation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sky view shows a black background with no atmosphere or landscape visible. The equatorial grid and the meridian line must be toggled on and visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct target is located and selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: M42 or the Orion Nebula is selected in the Stellarium sky view, with its detailed information block visible in the top left corner.

task_completion.description: Verify a screenshot was captured showing M42 at its transit point.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of Stellarium shows M42 positioned exactly on the meridian line (the line passing from North to South through the zenith).

task_completion.description: Verify the session automation plan was created with the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displays the contents of 'meridian_flip_plan.txt' on the Desktop, containing the target (M42 or Orion), the date (Nov 15, 2024), and the determined transit time (08:58 UTC).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Stellarium software to find the transit time.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual Stellarium GUI being manipulated (e.g., search window, location window, time window), rather than just a web browser or text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the transit time in the plan matches the simulated time in the screenshot.
integrity.visual_evidence: The clock/time displayed in the Stellarium interface when M42 is on the meridian line should read approximately 08:58 UTC, matching the time written in the text file.

integrity.description: Ensure the automation plan file was genuinely created and populated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of 'meridian_flip_plan.txt' must be visible on screen in a GUI text editor or via a terminal output command (like cat), proving the file exists with the required text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: M42 (Orion Nebula). Location: Mayhill, NM. Date: 2024-11-15. Required display settings: Atmosphere OFF, Landscape OFF, Equatorial Grid ON, Meridian Line ON. The correct calculated UTC transit time for M42 from this location on this date is 08:58 UTC. The automation plan must be saved at ~/Desktop/meridian_flip_plan.txt.
